'''Hemalian Barkid''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] businessperson from [[Drewwa]]. He worked for [[Trang Robotics]], and as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] had been assigned to [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. He owned a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] which was stolen by [[Ben Skywalker]] during his mission to acquire the [[Amulet of Kalara]].
